config.title: Reguła zmiany cen #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
const strSectionRowAttrib = "style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY' border='0'"
#include "50203"
'nx_section #include "50560"
function fopen() : fopen = true page_.addxml CTRLID_ITEM_CONTAINER, nx_build_ui() end function #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- dim g_oPriceChangeRule : set g_oPriceChangeRule = nothing
function get_rzc() if g_oPriceChangeRule is nothing then get_rzc = "" else get_rzc = g_oPriceChangeRule.ToString() end if end function
function set_rzc(byval strRZC) if False then set g_oPriceChangeRule = nx_.slot1.new_price_change_rule() else set g_oPriceChangeRule = nx_.slot0.new_price_change_rule() end if g_oPriceChangeRule.from_string strRZC end function
function on_accept() page_.result = 1 page_.goback end function function on_cancel() page_.result = 0 page_.goback end function
#comment '-----------------------------------------------------------
function c##CTRLID_GLOB_UPDATE_PRICE_RADIO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_oPriceChangeRule.workmode + 1 end function
function c##CTRLID_GLOB_UPDATE_PRICE_RADIO##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_GLOB_UPDATE_PRICE_RADIO##_ondataentered = true g_oPriceChangeRule.workmode = oCtrl.value - 1 end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) oCtrl.value = clng(g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).setrule + 1) end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ondataentered = true dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).setrule = (oCtrl.value - 1) end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_REFERENCE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1))
with g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem) oCtrl.value = clng(.reference + 1) end with end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_REFERENCE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_RADIO_REFERENCE##_ondataentered = true dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).reference = (oCtrl.value - 1) end function
function c##CTRLID_CURR_FACTOR##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) with g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem) oCtrl.value = .factor oCtrl.disable = (.setrule = 0) or (.reference = 0) end with end function
function c##CTRLID_CURR_FACTOR##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_CURR_FACTOR##_ondataentered = true dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).factor = oCtrl.value end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_ROUNDRULE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) oCtrl.value = clng(g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).roundrule + 1) end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_ROUNDRULE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_RADIO_ROUNDRULE##_ondataentered = true dim iItem : iItem = clng(oCtrl.userprop(1)) g_oPriceChangeRule.get_item(iItem).roundrule = (oCtrl.value - 1) end function
function nx_build_ui_item(byref oNXAspator,byval iNrCeny) dim strCenaName if iNrCeny < 7 then strCenaName = getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME + iNrCeny - 1) else strCenaName = "Minimalna cena sprzedaży" end if if strCenaName = "" then exit function end if oNXAspator.newgroup 3,strCenaName oNXAspator.newrow.newcell.e_space 1 oNXAspator.newrowex(strSectionRowAttrib).newcellex(1,"").e_label("Aktualizacja").newcellex 1,"" dim oRadioMode : set oRadioMode = oNXAspator.begin_e_radio_customex("style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY' colspan='3' " +_ " customredirect='CTRLID_RADIO_MODE' userprop=""vn1='" + cstr(iNrCeny) + "'""") oNXAspator.e_label "wyłączona" if iNrCeny = 7 then oNXAspator.e_label "włączona" else oNXAspator.e_label "ceny netto" oNXAspator.e_label "ceny brutto" end if oRadioMode.done
oNXAspator.newrowex(strSectionRowAttrib).newcellex(2,"").e_label "Wylicz cenę w oparciu o:" dim oRadioRef : set oRadioRef = oNXAspator.begin_e_radio_customex("style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY' colspan='3' " +_ " customredirect='CTRLID_RADIO_REFERENCE' userprop=""vn1='" + cstr(iNrCeny) + "'""") oNXAspator.e_label "nie wyliczaj" dim iter for iter = 1 to 6 strCenaName = getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME + iter - 1) if strCenaName = "" then oNXAspator.e_labelex "Cena " + cstr(iter),false,"disable='true'" else oNXAspator.e_label strCenaName end if next oNXAspator.e_label "Minimalna cena sprzedaży" '7 oNXAspator.e_label "Cena ostatniego zakupu" '8 oNXAspator.e_label "Cena ostatniej dostawy" '9 oRadioRef.done oNXAspator.newrowex(strSectionRowAttrib).newcell.e_label("Powiększ o").newcell.e_currency_customex "%",2,"customredirect='CTRLID_CURR_FACTOR' userprop=""vn1='" + cstr(iNrCeny) + "'"""
oNXAspator.newrowex(strSectionRowAttrib).newcellex(1,"").e_label("Zaokrąglenie").newcell dim oRadioRound : set oRadioRound = oNXAspator.begin_e_radio_customex("style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY' colspan='4' " +_ " customredirect='CTRLID_RADIO_ROUNDRULE' userprop=""vn1='" + cstr(iNrCeny) + "'""") oNXAspator.e_label "brak" oNXAspator.e_label "do 0,10" oNXAspator.e_label "do 1,00" oNXAspator.e_label "do 0,95" oNXAspator.e_label "do 0,99" oNXAspator.e_label "do 10,00" oNXAspator.e_label "do 9,95" oRadioRound.done oNXAspator.newrow.newcell.e_space 1 end function
function nx_build_ui() dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pNXAspator : set pNXAspator = nx_.new_aspator() with pNXAspator .init pStream .newtableex "" .newsectionex "tbody",2, "" dim iter for iter = 1 to 7 nx_build_ui_item pNXAspator,iter next .flush end with #ifdef _DEBUG pStream.save "c:\temp\20186_nx_build_ui.txt" #endif pStream.rewind set nx_build_ui = pStream end function #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------

table.tbody:
wyłącz włącz wg grupy nadrzędnej
QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,OK,varFunction="on_accept") QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,Anuluj,varFunction="on_cancel")
